title: Using protein turnover to expand the applications of transcriptomics.
author: Smail MA Reigle JK McCullumsmith RE
content: S-EPMC7902815 PMC7902815 Using protein turnover to expand the applications of transcriptomics. RNA expression and protein abundance are often at odds when measured in parallel, raising questions about the functional implications of transcriptomics data. Here, we present the concept of persistence
